title: Data Release
text:
Building upon XKDR’s pioneering research into litigant decision-making, we are thrilled to announce the public release of an expanded dataset covering cases filed and heard at the Bombay High Court and the National Company Law Tribunal. This release significantly augments the data underpinning our previous findings on three critical questions concerning litigant behavior and judicial outcomes.


Download Case Data



Name: Bombay High Court and NCLT Case Data
Description: Case records from Bombay High Court and National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for selected case types.
Data Description:

matter_id: Unique identifier for each record

court_name: Name of the court where the case was filed
filing_no: Case filing number

filing_date: Date the case was filed

disposal_date: Date the case was disposed

hearing_id: Unique identifier for hearing

hearing_date: Date of the hearing

case_status: Current status of the case (e.g., Pending, Disposed)

case_typology: Type of case (e.g., Commercial Suits, Suits, Summary Suits)


Source: Bombay High Court and NCLT
The last date of updation is reflected in the dataset itself.
Related Research

Helping litigants make informed choices in resolving debt disputes — Pavithra Manivannan, Susan Thomas, and Bhargavi Zaveri-Shah, Leap Blog, June 2023

Evaluating courts from a litigant’s perspective: A project report — Pavithra Manivannan, Geetika Palta, Susan Thomas, and Bhargavi Zaveri-Shah, December 2023




Use tools like Excel, R, or Python to analyze the data and build insights.
